longDescription:
Monitor your CPU and GPU temperature straight from your Ulanzi Deck, on Mac or Windows.

Add two buttons — one for the CPU, one for the GPU — and see the current temperature update live, color-coded from cool green to hot red. Click a key any time to switch between °C and °F. Update interval is configurable per key.

Temperatures are read locally via a tiny native helper — no network access, no cloud service. On macOS this reads on-die thermal sensors directly (same technique used by tools like macmon), no sudo needed; works on Apple Silicon (M1–M4) and Intel Macs. On Windows it uses LibreHardwareMonitorLib (the engine behind HWiNFO); for full CPU sensor access, run Ulanzi Studio as Administrator.
